name: optimizely-config
title: Experimentation / Feature Flagging (Optimizely / LaunchDarkly)
description: MCP connector to control feature flags and roll out experiments (supports Optimizely, LaunchDarkly or similar).

auth.notes: Provide management API key with permissions to create toggles and assign audiences (prefer scoped tokens).

exampleUsage: Create a 'pre-fill-claim' flag and release to 50% of manager users; check metrics via analytics-config.
